description: CompositionBlue round neck top made of 95% cotton and 5% Lycra, has short sleeves, flaring pintucks at the neck, embroidery on the chest and crystal branding above the hemFitRegularWash careWash with warm waterDo not bleach, use chlorine or iron on printWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsarrow caters to fashionistas with a taste for the trendy and understated. This top is a sober hued basic piece, perfect for layering under a blazer or wear it with your favourite jeans on days when it's too sunny for layering!Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
